footer.description: Premium car rental service offering luxury vehicles for every occasion. Experience the joy of driving your dream car.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get the latest deals and updates delivered to your inbox.

home.heroSubtitle: From luxury sedans to exotic sports cars — access the world's finest vehicles with just a few clicks.
home.featuresSubtitle: We're not just a car rental — we're a premium driving experience.
home.feature1Desc: Drive with peace of mind knowing you're fully covered with our comprehensive insurance options.
home.feature2Desc: Round-the-clock roadside support wherever you are. Help is always just a call away.
home.feature3Desc: Book your dream car in seconds with our streamlined, hassle-free reservation system.
home.feature4Desc: Pick up and drop off at any of our 25+ locations nationwide — airports, city centers, and more.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your dream ride
home.step1Desc: Browse our premium fleet and select the perfect vehicle for your needs.
home.step2Desc: Pick your preferred pickup and drop-off dates and locations.
home.step3Desc: Complete your booking, pick up your keys, and hit the road!
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Trusted by thousands of happy drivers
home.testimonial1Content: DriveRent made my business trip seamless. The Tesla Model S was immaculate and the booking process was incredibly smooth. Will definitely use again!
home.testimonial2Content: Rented a Porsche 911 for our anniversary road trip. The car was pristine and the customer service was outstanding. A truly premium experience.
home.testimonial3Content: The best car rental experience I've ever had. The Range Rover was perfect for our mountain trip. Easy booking, easy return. Five stars all around!
home.ctaSubtitle: Join over 15,000 satisfied customers who trust DriveRent for their premium car rental needs.
home.featuredVehiclesSubtitle: Handpicked premium vehicles from our exclusive fleet
home.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Everything you need for a seamless premium experience
home.why1Desc: Over 200 meticulously maintained luxury, sports, and exotic vehicles
home.why2Desc: No hidden fees. What you see is what you pay, guaranteed
home.why3Desc: Plans change — cancel up to 24 hours before pickup for free
home.why4Desc: Moroccan roads, routes, and destinations curated by locals
home.why5Desc: Real people, real help — anytime, anywhere in Morocco
home.why6Desc: Drop off at any location. Flexible return, zero hassle

home.destMarrakechDesc: Vibrant souks, palaces & the Jemaa el-Fna
home.destTangierDesc: Where the Atlantic meets the Mediterranean
home.destChefchaouenDesc: The blue pearl of the Rif Mountains
home.trustSubtitle: Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous 150-point inspection before each rental
home.trust2Desc: Comprehensive coverage included on every booking
home.trust3Desc: Real feedback from real customers you can trust

about.title: About DriveRent
about.heroSubtitle: We're on a mission to redefine the car rental experience with premium vehicles, exceptional service, and innovative technology.
about.heroDescription: We're on a mission to redefine the car rental experience with premium vehicles, exceptional service, and innovative technology.
about.missionParagraph1: At DriveRent, we believe that renting a car should be as enjoyable as driving one. Our mission is to provide a seamless, premium car rental experience that exceeds expectations at every turn.
about.missionParagraph2: We curate the finest vehicles from world-renowned brands and combine them with exceptional customer service to create unforgettable journeys for our clients.
about.missionText1: At DriveRent, we believe that renting a car should be as enjoyable as driving one. Our mission is to provide a seamless, premium car rental experience that exceeds expectations at every turn.
about.missionText2: We curate the finest vehicles from world-renowned brands and combine them with exceptional customer service to create unforgettable journeys for our clients.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that drive everything we do.

trust.title: Trust & Reliability
trust.description: We build lasting relationships through transparency, honesty, and consistently delivering on our promises.

customerFirst.title: Customer First
customerFirst.description: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. Their satisfaction is our top priority.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for excellence in everything we do, from the quality of our vehicles to the service we provide.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We believe premium car rental should be accessible to everyone, with flexible options and transparent pricing.

about.value1Desc: We strive for excellence in everything we do, from the quality of our vehicles to the service we provide.
about.value2Desc: We embrace technology and innovation to make car renting seamless and enjoyable.
about.value3Desc: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. Their satisfaction is our top priority.
about.value4Desc: We're committed to a greener future with our growing fleet of electric and hybrid vehicles.

about.sustainabilityParagraph1: We believe in responsible business practices. Our fleet includes a growing number of electric and hybrid vehicles, and we're committed to reducing our carbon footprint.
about.sustainabilityParagraph2: Through partnerships with environmental organizations and investments in green technology, we're working towards a more sustainable future for the transportation industry.

locations.airportPickupDesc: Convenient vehicle collection at Morocco's major airports
locations.nearbyAreasDesc: We serve these areas and surrounding regions
locations.branchReviewsDesc: Real reviews from renters at our branches
locations.faqDesc: Everything you need to know about our services
locations.faqAirportQ: Can I pick up the car at the airport?
locations.faqAirportA: Yes! We offer convenient airport pickup at all major Moroccan airports including Agadir Al Massira, Marrakech Menara, and Casablanca Mohammed V. Our team will be waiting for you at arrivals.
locations.faqHotelA: Absolutely. We offer free hotel delivery within 15km of any of our branches. Simply select your hotel address during booking and we'll bring the car to you.
locations.faqOneWayA: Yes, we offer one-way rentals between our branches. A small one-way fee may apply depending on the pickup and drop-off locations.
locations.faqDocsA: You'll need a valid driver's license (held for at least 1 year), a passport or national ID, and a credit card in the driver's name. International renters also need an International Driving Permit.
locations.newsletterDesc: Get exclusive deals and travel tips delivered to your inbox

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: DriveRent ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our car rental services and website.
privacy.section2Intro: We may collect the following types of information:

section2Personal.label: Personal Information:
section2Personal.value: Name, email address, phone number, driver's license information, and payment details.

section2Payment.label: Payment Information:
section2Payment.value: Credit card numbers, billing addresses, and transaction history.

section2Usage.label: Usage Data:
section2Usage.value: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on our website.

section2Location.label: Location Data:
section2Location.value: Pickup and drop-off locations for rental transactions.

privacy.section3Intro: We use your information for the following purposes:
privacy.section3Item1: To process rental transactions and manage bookings.
privacy.section3Item2: To communicate with you about your reservations and account.
privacy.section3Item3: To improve our services and customer experience.
privacy.section3Item4: To send promotional materials (with your consent).
privacy.section3Item5: To ensure the security of our platform.
privacy.section3Item7: To process insurance claims and handle disputes.
privacy.section4Content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with service providers who assist in our operations, insurance companies for claims processing, and law enforcement when required by law.
privacy.section5Content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section6Intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.section6Item4: Opt out of marketing communications at any time.
privacy.section7Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@driverent.com.
privacy.introText: DriveRent ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our car rental services and website.
privacy.infoText: We may collect information that you provide directly, including your name, email address, phone number, driver's license information, payment details, and rental preferences. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and usage of our services.
privacy.usageText: We use your information to process rentals, communicate with you about your bookings, improve our services, send promotional materials (with your consent), and ensure the security of our platform.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with service providers who assist in our operations, insurance companies for claims processing, and law enforcement when required by law.
privacy.securityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt out of marketing communications at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@driverent.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using DriveRent's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Content: You must be at least 21 years old with a valid driver's license to rent a vehicle. International renters must present a valid international driving permit.
terms.section3Item1: All bookings are subject to availability.
terms.section3Item2: A valid payment method is required at the time of booking.
terms.section3Item3: Cancellations made 48 hours before pickup receive a full refund.
terms.section3Item4: Cancellations within 48 hours of pickup may incur a cancellation fee.
terms.section3Item5: Prices are subject to change without prior notice.
terms.section4Item1: Vehicles must be used in accordance with all applicable laws.
terms.section4Item2: Smoking is strictly prohibited in all vehicles.
terms.section4Item3: Off-road driving is not permitted unless explicitly authorized.
terms.section4Item4: Use for illegal activities is strictly prohibited.
terms.section4Item5: Renters are responsible for all traffic violations incurred during the rental period.
terms.section5Content: Basic insurance is included with all rentals. Optional premium coverage is available for additional protection. Renters are responsible for the deductible amount specified in their rental agreement.
terms.section6Content: Late returns are subject to additional charges. A grace period of 2 hours is provided, after which hourly rates apply. Returns more than 24 hours late may be charged an additional day.
terms.section7Content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@driverent.com.
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using DriveRent's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.eligibilityText: You must be at least 21 years old with a valid driver's license to rent a vehicle. International renters must present a valid international driving permit.
terms.bookingsText: All bookings are subject to availability. A valid payment method is required at the time of booking. Cancellations made 48 hours before pickup receive a full refund.
terms.vehicleText: Vehicles must be used in accordance with all applicable laws. Smoking, off-road driving, and use for illegal activities are strictly prohibited. Renters are responsible for all traffic violations.
terms.insuranceText: Basic insurance is included with all rentals. Optional premium coverage is available for additional protection. Renters are responsible for the deductible amount specified in their rental agreement.
terms.lateText: Late returns are subject to additional charges. A grace period of 2 hours is provided, after which hourly rates apply. Returns more than 24 hours late may be charged an additional day.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@driverent.com.
